assumptions.name: initial_synchronous_reset
assumptions.rule: rst is asserted in the initial formal state
assumptions.reason: the production core requires a sampled synchronous reset before use

assumptions.name: tick_start_stability
assumptions.rule: tick_start_valid and tick_id remain stable while valid is backpressured

assumptions.name: event_stability
assumptions.rule: event_valid, axon, payload, and priority remain stable while valid is backpressured

assumptions.name: valid_axon_range
assumptions.rule: event_axon is less than AXON_COUNT whenever event_valid is asserted

assumptions.name: representable_payload_range
assumptions.rule: all 8-bit event_payload values are legal; no narrower value assumption is made
assumptions.reason: the production payload contract is exactly the encoded unsigned field width

assumptions.name: representable_logical_tick_range
assumptions.rule: all 16-bit tick_id values are legal; no monotonicity assumption is made
assumptions.reason: the production host owns logical tick values within the encoded field width

assumptions.name: compiled_image_legality
assumptions.rule: ROM contents are the checked generated 8-neuron, 2-axon, 8-synapse image
assumptions.reason: the production top executes a compile-time image, not arbitrary malformed memories

assumptions.name: supported_neuron_subset
assumptions.rule: all models are fixed-synapse LIF with non-negative leak, zero delay, and no learning metadata

explicitly_not_assumed: any asserted design output already satisfies a proved property
